nativePolicy: aria-pressed, data-state, and the visual state remain synchronized.
Consumer cancellation prevents the state transition.
Pending remains focusable and prevents state changes.

compositionPolicy.familySignature: A Green pressed rail and Violet focus seam distinguish state without color alone.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: pending and pendingLabel add focus-retaining update semantics; false removes the indicator, loading rail, busy output, and guard.
